title: Surgeon Vacancy at B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates in Varanasi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates:
B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with B.Braun India Asia Pacific Associates!
